title: elaeocarpus latescens
intro: Elaeocarpus latescens, also known as the 'Dwarf Blue Fig', is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus latescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections. Elaeocarpus latescens is often prepared as a herbal tea or used as a poultice, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
